title: polygala selaginoides
intro: Polygala selaginoides, also known as Yin Yang Huo in traditional Chinese medicine, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Polygalaceae family. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as improving cardiovascular health, reducing blood pressure, and enhancing immune function. Herbal preparations of Polygala selaginoides include tea, capsules, and tinctures, which are often used to treat conditions such as fatigue, anxiety, and respiratory problems.
